questionText: Provide details of your environmental engagement strategy with your investees.
questionKo: details of your environmental engagement strategy with your investees.을/를 입력하십시오.
simpleHelp: This question provides data users with more transparency regarding investee engagement processes. Data users are interested in understanding how financial services companies are working with their investees to drive environmental action, such as whether organizations encourage their investees to set science-based targets.

guidance.text: This question appears if select "Yes" in response to column 1 "Engaging with this stakeholder on environmental issues" for the row "Investees" of 5.11.
guidance.textKo: This 문항 appears 만약 select "Yes" in response to 열 1 "Engaging with this 이해관계자 on 환경 이슈" 에 대한 행 "Investees" of 5.11.

guidance.text:
General 
Provide details about your organization's investee engagement strategy regarding environmental issues.
This question focuses on corporate investees only.
% of scope 3 investees associated emissions as reported in 12.1.1/12.1.3 (column 3) 
This column only appears if "Climate change" is selected in column 1 "Environmental issues covered by the engagement strategy".
Only include the percentage of investee-related scope 3 emissions reported in 12.1.1/12.1.3 that are attributable to investees participating in the activity selected in this row.
% of investing (Asset managers) portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value (column 4) 
Provide the proportion your portfolio covered by the engagement process/strategy based on the total portfolio value, as reported in question 1.10.
% of investing (Asset owners) portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value (column 5) 
Provide the proportion of your portfolio covered by the engagement strategy based on the total portfolio value, as reported in question 1.10.
Explain the rationale for the coverage of your engagement (column 6) 
Explain how and why investees were chosen for the engagement selected in column 2 "Type and details of engagement", e.g., proportion of revenue generated, geographic location, etc.
Investee engagement can be either untargeted (undertaken generally with all investees or undertaken with a selection of investees without a basis for the selection) or targeted at specific investees, such as investees in a particular sector with increased environmental risks relative to other sectors. There is a place for both, but targeted engagement may be more effective at driving change in the real economy.
Explain the rationale for the coverage of your engagement (column 6) 
Explain how and why investees were chosen for the engagement selected in column 2a "Type of engagement", e.g., proportion of revenue generated, geographic location, etc. 
Investee engagement can be either untargeted (undertaken generally with all investees or undertaken with a selection of investees without a basis for the selection) or targeted at specific investees, such as investees in a particular sector with increased environmental risks relative to other sectors. There is a place for both, but targeted engagement may be more effective at driving change in the real economy.
Describe how you communicate your engagement strategy to your clients and/or to the public (column 7) 
Briefly describe the process you have for communicating your engagement strategy, including whether it is publicly available, whether you communicate progress and outcomes of engagements with investees or the public and, if so, how.
Roles of individuals at the portfolio organizations the entity seeks to engage with (column 10) 
Select all options which represent the roles in the portfolio organizations you aim to engage with as part of your environmental engagement strategy.
Effect of engagement, including measures of success (column 11) 
Discuss the impact of this engagement and how you measure its success.
Include a threshold at which you consider your effect to be successful with regard to the measure of success. For example, if you select "Provide training, support, and best practices on how to set science-based targets," the measure of success could be a 10% increase in clients obtaining validation of their emissions reduction targets by the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi).
Define the coverage of your investment portfolio based on the portfolio value represented by investees participating in this engagement activity.
Include a description of any engagement activity you undertake with investee organizations to manage environmental risks in your investment portfolio.
Provide examples of positive outcomes achieved. For example, this could include investees reducing product use-phase GHG emissions or increasing renewable energy procurement.
The description should be organization-specific and include details on the impact of the environmental investee engagement strategy.
Describe your escalation process (column 13) 
This column only appears if "Yes, we have an escalation process" is selected in column 12 "Escalation process for engagement when dialogue is failing".
Describe the tactics included in your escalation process e.g., how you express concerns, making public statements, expressing concerns collectively with other investors or shareholders, speaking at general meetings, exit or threat to exit from the investment and others.
guidance.textKo: 일반 세부 정보를 입력 about 귀사의 investee 참여 전략 regarding 환경 이슈. This 문항 focuses on corporate investees only. % of scope 3 investees associated emissions as 보고 in 12.1.1/12.1.3 (열 3) This 열 only appears 만약 "기후변화" is 선택 in 열 1 "환경 이슈 covered by the 참여 전략". Only include the percentage of investee-related Scope 3 배출량 보고 in 12.1.1/12.1.3 that are attributable to investees participating in the activity 선택 in this 행. % of investing (자산운용사) 포트폴리오 covered in relation to total 포트폴리오 value (열 4) Provide the proportion your 포트폴리오 covered by the 참여 프로세스/전략 based on the total 포트폴리오 value, as 보고 in 문항 1.10. % of investing (Asset owners) 포트폴리오 covered in relation to total 포트폴리오 value (열 5) Provide the proportion of your 포트폴리오 covered by the 참여 전략 based on the total 포트폴리오 value, as 보고 in 문항 1.10. Explain the rationale 에 대한 coverage of your 참여 (열 6) Explain how 및 why investees were chosen 에 대한 참여 선택 in 열 2 "Type 및 details of 참여", e.g., proportion of 매출 generated, geographic location, etc. Investee 참여 can be either un목표ed (undertaken generally with all investees 또는 undertaken with a 선택 of investees without a basis 에 대한 선택) 또는 목표ed at specific investees, such as investees in a particular sector with 증가 environmental 리스크 relative to other sectors. There is a place for both, but 목표ed 참여 may be more effective at driving change in the real economy. Explain the rationale 에 대한 coverage of your 참여 (열 6) Explain how 및 why investees were chosen 에 대한 참여 선택 in 열 2a "Type of 참여", e.g., proportion of 매출 generated, geographic location, etc. Investee 참여 can be either un목표ed (undertaken generally with all investees 또는 undertaken with a 선택 of investees without a basis 에 대한 선택) 또는 목표ed at specific investees, such as investees in a particular sector with 증가 environmental 리스크 relative to other sectors. There is a place for both, but 목표ed 참여 may be more effective at driving change in the real economy. 설명 how you communicate your 참여 전략 to your clients 및/또는 to the 공개 (열 7) Briefly 설명 the 프로세스 you have for communicating your 참여 전략, 포함 whether it is 공개되어 있음, whether you communicate progress 및 outcomes of 참여s with investees 또는 the 공개 and, 만약 so, how. Roles of individuals at the 포트폴리오 organizations the entity seeks to engage with (열 10) Select all options which represent the roles in the 포트폴리오 organizations you aim to engage with 의 일부로 your environmental 참여 전략. Effect of 참여, 포함 measures of success (열 11) Discuss the impact of this 참여 및 how you measure its success. Include a threshold at which you consider your effect to be successful with regard to the measure of success. For example, 만약 you select "Provide training, support, 및 best practices on how to set science-based 목표," the measure of success could be a 10% increase in clients obtaining validation 의ir emissions reduction 목표 by the Science Based 목표 이니셔티브 (SBTi). Define the coverage of your investment 포트폴리오 based on the 포트폴리오 value represented by investees participating in this 참여 activity. Include a description of 하나 이상 참여 activity you undertake with investee organizations to manage environmental 리스크 in your investment 포트폴리오. Provide examples of positive outcomes achieved. For example, this could include investees reducing product use-phase 온실가스 배출량 또는 increasing 재생에너지 procurement. The description 해야 합니다 be organization-specific 및 include details on the impact 의 environmental investee 참여 전략. 설명 your escalation 프로세스 (열 13) This 열 only appears 만약 "Yes, we have an escalation 프로세스" is 선택 in 열 12 "Escalation 프로세스 for 참여 경우 dialogue is failing". 설명 the tactics included in your escalation 프로세스 e.g., how you express concerns, making 공개 statements, expressing concerns collectively with other investors 또는 shareholders, speaking at general meetings, exit 또는 threat to exit from the investment 및 others.

guidance.text: Financial services companies have investee engagement strategies for environmental issues and undertake engagement with investees to positively affect their own performance and the environment.
guidance.textKo: 금융 서비스 companies have investee 참여 strategies for 환경 이슈 및 undertake 참여 with investees to positively affect their own performance 및 the environment.

guidance.text:
Adaptation: In human systems, the process of adjustment to actual or expected climate and its effects, in order to moderate harm or exploit beneficial opportunities. In natural systems, the process of adjustment to actual climate and its effects; human intervention may facilitate adjustment to expected climate and its effects. ( IPCC, 2018 )
Climate Transition plan: an encompassing instrument that helps organizations to align their climate ambitions. This alignment is achieved by establishing specific strategies and clear accountability mechanisms to track progress. 
Climate transition plan which aligns with a 1.5°C world: a time-bound action plan that clearly outlines how an organization will achieve its strategy to pivot its existing assets, operations, and entire business model towards a trajectory that aligns with the latest and most ambitious climate science recommendations, i.e., halving greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions by 2030 and reaching net-zero by 2050 at the latest, thereby limiting global warming to 1.5 degrees Celsius. Please refer to the CDP Climate Transition Plan technical note for more details. 
Landscape: defined geographic area with common and interacting ecological and socioeconomic characteristics. They may be delineated based on river basins, seascapes, ecosystems, jurisdictional boundaries, or in other ways (adapted from AFi, 2024 ). 
Portfolio: In the context of this questionnaire, your portfolio is your entire collection of your core financing activities and insurance policies that you offer. For banking, this is the entire collection of products, securities and loans held on your balance sheet for which you own the receivable stream. For asset managers, this is the entire collection of your products and investments that you hold and/or manage on behalf of your clients. For asset owners, this is the entire collection of products, funds and investments owned and controlled by your organization. For investment portfolios, asset managers should consider discretionary investments, those where the organization has discretion over investment decision. For insurance underwriting, this is the entire collection of products and insurance policies you provide to your clients. 
Target: a specific measurable output to be achieved within a specific timeline. Targets often act as steps towards a wider and long-term corporate goal.
guidance.textKo: Adaptation: In human systems, the 프로세스 of adjustment to actual 또는 expected climate 및 its effects, in order to moderate harm 또는 exploit beneficial 기회. In natural systems, the 프로세스 of adjustment to actual climate 및 its effects; human intervention may facilitate adjustment to expected climate 및 its effects. (IPCC, 2018) 기후 전환계획: an encompassing instrument that helps organizations to align their climate ambitions. This alignment is achieved by establishing specific strategies 및 clear accountability mechanisms to track progress. 기후 전환계획 which aligns with a 1.5°C world: a time-bound action plan that clearly outlines how an organization will achieve its 전략 to pivot its existing 자산, operations, 및 entire business model towards a trajectory that aligns with the latest 및 most ambitious climate science recommendations, i.e., halving greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions by 2030 및 reaching net-zero by 2050 at the latest, thereby limiting global warming to 1.5 degrees Celsius. Please refer to the CDP 기후 전환계획 technical note for more details. Landscape: defined geographic area with common 및 interacting ecological 및 socioeconomic characteristics. They may be delineated based on river basins, seascapes, ecosystems, jurisdictional boundaries, 또는 in other ways (adapted from AFi, 2024). 포트폴리오: In the context of this 질문서, your 포트폴리오 is your entire collection of your core financing activities 및 insurance policies that you offer. For banking, this is the entire collection of products, securities 및 loans held on your balance sheet for which you own the receivable stream. For 자산운용사, this is the entire collection of your products 및 investments that you hold 및/또는 manage on behalf of your clients. For asset owners, this is the entire collection of products, funds 및 investments owned 및 controlled by 귀사. For investment 포트폴리오s, 자산운용사 해야 합니다 consider discretionary investments, those 여기서 the organization has discretion over investment decision. For insurance underwriting, this is the entire collection of products 및 insurance policies you provide to your clients. 목표: a specific measurable output to be achieved within a specific timeline. 목표 often act as steps towards a wider 및 long-term corporate goal.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the engagement strategy':
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of rows disclosed as follows:
Any of the following columns completed per row:
-'% of scope 3 investees associated emissions as reported in 12.1.1/12.1.3'
-'% of investing (Asset managers) portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value'
-'% of investing (Asset owners) portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value'
A maximum of 6/6 points is available for this route.
OR
NOT APPLICABLE ROUTE)
'Climate change' NOT selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the engagement strategy' in any row - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 A) For 행 여기서 '기후변화' is 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈 covered by the 참여 전략': 점수가 부여됩니다 per 완성된 칸(셀) in proportion to the number of 행 공개 as follows: 하나 이상 의 following 열 완성 per 행: -'% of scope 3 investees associated emissions as 보고 in 12.1.1/12.1.3' -'% of investing (자산운용사) 포트폴리오 covered in relation to total 포트폴리오 value' -'% of investing (Asset owners) 포트폴리오 covered in relation to total 포트폴리오 value' 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 6/6점입니다. 또는 NOT APPLICABLE 경로) '기후변화' NOT 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈 covered by the 참여 전략' in 하나 이상 행 - 0/0 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/0점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Full Disclosure points must be awarded to be eligible for Awareness points.
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issue covered by the engagement strategy':
All of the following met - 1 point
Any option excluding 'Other, please specify' selected in column 'Type and details of engagement' AND
'Yes' selected in column 'Activity undertaken' in row 'Investing (Asset manager)' in question 1.10 AND
Any option excluding 'None' OR 'Unknown' selected in column '% of investing (Asset managers) portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value'.
OR
All of the following met - 1 point
Any option excluding 'Other, please specify' selected in column 'Type and details of engagement' AND
'Yes' selected in column 'Activity undertaken' in row 'Investing (Asset owner)' in question 1.10 AND
Any option excluding 'None' OR 'Unknown' selected in column '% of investing (Asset owners) portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value'.
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
One row scored.
(Please note: If both 'Investing (Asset manager)' and 'Investing (Asset owner)' are selected as organizational activities in question 1.10, then only one of the options in the above criteria must be met.)
OR
NOT APPLICABLE ROUTE)
'Climate change' NOT selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the engagement strategy' in any row - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 A) 인지 점수를 획득하려면 공시에서 최고점을 획득해야 합니다. For 행 여기서 '기후변화' is 선택 in 열 'Environmental issue covered by the 참여 전략': All 의 following met - 1 점 하나 이상 option 제외 'Other, 직접 입력' 선택 in 열 'Type 및 details of 참여' 그리고 'Yes' 선택 in 열 'Activity undertaken' in 행 'Investing (Asset manager)' in 문항 1.10 그리고 하나 이상 option 제외 '없음' 또는 'Unknown' 선택 in 열 '% of investing (자산운용사) 포트폴리오 covered in relation to total 포트폴리오 value'. 또는 All 의 following met - 1 점 하나 이상 option 제외 'Other, 직접 입력' 선택 in 열 'Type 및 details of 참여' 그리고 'Yes' 선택 in 열 'Activity undertaken' in 행 'Investing (Asset owner)' in 문항 1.10 그리고 하나 이상 option 제외 '없음' 또는 'Unknown' 선택 in 열 '% of investing (Asset owners) 포트폴리오 covered in relation to total 포트폴리오 value'. 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다. One 행 scored. (Please note: 만약 both 'Investing (Asset manager)' 및 'Investing (Asset owner)' are 선택 as organizational activities in 문항 1.10, then only one 의 options in the above 기준 해야 합니다 be met.) 또는 NOT APPLICABLE 경로) '기후변화' NOT 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈 covered by the 참여 전략' in 하나 이상 행 - 0/0 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/0점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issue covered by the engagement strategy':
The following conditions must be met to be eligible for Management points:
Full Awareness points must be awarded AND
Any option excluding any 'Information collection' options selected in 'Type and details of engagement'.
i) 'Yes, we have an escalation process' selected in column 'Escalation process for engagement when dialogue is failing' - 1.5 points
ii) Any option excluding 'None' OR 'Unknown' selected in column '% Scope 3 investees associated emissions as reported in 12.1.1/12.1.3' OR in column '% of investing (Asset managers) portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value' OR in column '% of investing (Asset owners) portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value' - 1.5 points
A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this route.
One row scored.
OR
NOT APPLICABLE ROUTE)
'Climate change' NOT selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the engagement strategy' in any row - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 A) For 행 여기서 '기후변화' is 선택 in 열 'Environmental issue covered by the 참여 전략': The following conditions 해야 합니다 be met to be 획득 가능 for 관리 점: Full 인지 점수를 획득해야 합니다 그리고 하나 이상 option 제외 하나 이상 'Information collection' options 선택 in 'Type 및 details of 참여'. i) 'Yes, we have an escalation 프로세스' 선택 in 열 'Escalation 프로세스 for 참여 경우 dialogue is failing' - 1.5 점 ii) 하나 이상 option 제외 '없음' 또는 'Unknown' 선택 in 열 '% Scope 3 investees associated emissions as 보고 in 12.1.1/12.1.3' 또는 in 열 '% of investing (자산운용사) 포트폴리오 covered in relation to total 포트폴리오 value' 또는 in 열 '% of investing (Asset owners) 포트폴리오 covered in relation to total 포트폴리오 value' - 1.5 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 3/3점입니다. One 행 scored. 또는 NOT APPLICABLE 경로) '기후변화' NOT 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈 covered by the 참여 전략' in 하나 이상 행 - 0/0 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/0점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
The following conditions must be met to be eligible for Leadership points:
Full Management points must be awarded to be eligible for Leadership points AND
'Yes' in column 'We measure the impact of our portfolio on the climate' and 'Financed emissions' selected in column 'Disclosure metric' for any row in question 12.1.
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the engagement strategy':
Any of the following selected in column '% of scope 3 investees associated emissions as reported in 12.1.1/12.1.3' OR in either column '% of investing (Asset managers) portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value' OR '% of investing (Asset owners) portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value' - 1 point
-'51-75%'
-'76-99%'
-'100%'
OR
'26-50%' selected in either column '% of scope 3 investees associated emissions as reported in 12.1.1/12.1.3' OR in either column '% of investing (Asset managers) portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value' OR '% of investing (Asset owners) portfolio covered in relation to total portfolio value' - 0.5/1 points
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
One row scored.
OR
NOT APPLICABLE ROUTE)
'Climate change' NOT selected in column 'Environmental issues covered by the engagement strategy' in any row - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 A) The following conditions 해야 합니다 be met to be 획득 가능 for 리더십 점: Full 관리 점수를 획득해야 합니다 to be 획득 가능 for 리더십 점 그리고 'Yes' in 열 'We measure the impact of our 포트폴리오 on the climate' 및 '금융배출량' 선택 in 열 '공시 metric' for 하나 이상 행 in 문항 12.1. For 행 여기서 '기후변화' is 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈 covered by the 참여 전략': 하나 이상 의 following 선택 in 열 '% of scope 3 investees associated emissions as 보고 in 12.1.1/12.1.3' 또는 in either 열 '% of investing (자산운용사) 포트폴리오 covered in relation to total 포트폴리오 value' 또는 '% of investing (Asset owners) 포트폴리오 covered in relation to total 포트폴리오 value' - 1 점 -'51-75%' -'76-99%' -'100%' 또는 '26-50%' 선택 in either 열 '% of scope 3 investees associated emissions as 보고 in 12.1.1/12.1.3' 또는 in either 열 '% of investing (자산운용사) 포트폴리오 covered in relation to total 포트폴리오 value' 또는 '% of investing (Asset owners) 포트폴리오 covered in relation to total 포트폴리오 value' - 0.5/1 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다. One 행 scored. 또는 NOT APPLICABLE 경로) '기후변화' NOT 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈 covered by the 참여 전략' in 하나 이상 행 - 0/0 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/0점입니다.

simpleHelpKo: This 문항 provides 데이터 사용자 with more transparency regarding investee 참여 프로세스es. 데이터 사용자 are interested in understanding how 금융 서비스 companies are working with their investees to drive environmental action, such as whether organizations encourage their investees to set science-based 목표.
